name: contextify
description: Contextify — persistent context engine for AI coding assistants: screenshot compression + a live Software Knowledge Graph of your codebase.

plugins.name: contextify
plugins.description: Persistent context engine: Claude queries your project instead of re-discovering it. 13 tools — screenshot→markdown compression (~95% fewer vision tokens), live Software Knowledge Graph for React/Next.js + Flutter with incremental indexing, what-if change simulation, visual Mermaid explanations, impact analysis with regression risk, architecture score, feature graph, screenshot↔code matching, and a git-tagged architecture timeline. Interactive graph.html visualization + CLI included. 100% local — code never leaves your machine.
